title: Webinar: Construction Project Management with monday.com

posts.author: Anastasia (Anastasia Geneave - Kick Consulting )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Anastasia here, I work with Kick Consulting, monday.com partner in Australia.

We’ve got a free webinar coming up - Construction Project Management with monday.com.

2024-02-28T01:00:00Z→2024-02-28T02:00:00Z

If you’re keen to take a peek, register below.

https://bit.ly/construction-project-monday

posts.author: Anastasia (Anastasia Geneave - Kick Consulting )
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love your help. Next week I’m running my first webinar for Kick, and as much as my nerves would love a small audience, the idea is to fill the room.

If you know anyone in the construction space who might find this interesting, could you forward this to them?

Free webinar showing off our Construction solution, built in monday.com, of course.

I’ll show you:

How our clients use monday.com to manage projects big and small

Improve on-site and off-site communication

Manage subcontractors

Plan your jobs, with locations and team workloads in mind

Make changes and decisions on the go, with everyone updated in real time

Also, one lucky attendee will win the solution template that we’ve built and will show, valued at $5,000 AUD!

Find out more and register here: https://www.kickconsulting.com.au/event-details/construction-project-management-with-monday-com
